title: alchemilla vulgaris subsp. glabra
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. glabra, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and protecting against skin irritations. Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. glabra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
